name: Chili Casserole with Cornbread
recipeIngredient: 15 1/2 oz Can dark red kidney beans
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 400 degrees Fahrenheit. In a large skillet over medium-high heat, brown the ground beef and drain. Stir in the salsa, kidney beans, tomatoes, corn, chili powder, and cumin. Cook for 3 to 4 minutes or until thoroughly heated, stirring occasionally.
2. Prepare the cornbread according to package instructions using milk and margarine. If required by the mix, add an egg as well. Spoon the cornbread batter around the outside edge of a greased 12x8-inch (2-quart) baking dish. Place the hot beef mixture in the center. The casserole will be full.
3. Bake at 400 degrees Fahrenheit for 18 minutes. Sprinkle with shredded cheddar cheese and return to the oven to bake for an additional 4 to 5 minutes or until the cheese is melted and the cornbread is deep golden brown. Sprinkle with sliced green onions just before serving.
